---
title: "Additional Resources"
format: html
---

### Data Stewardship 

 - The [Data Stewardship Toolkit]() is a group of worksheets and checklists that guides users through several data stewardship processes and actions. 

 - EXAMPLE: [Utrecht Bioinformatics Center Zenodo Community](https://zenodo.org/communities/ubc-rdm/) with 4 publications on data stewardship. 

<br>
 
### FAIR 
 - FAIR Data Training for Deep Ocean Early Career Researchers: [Syllabus and slide presentations](https://darchive.mblwhoilibrary.org/entities/publication/3c9f2ea4-ab3d-49ec-bdb8-25b22add5418) 

<br>

### Code Management & Publishing

 - [Publising code from GitHub to Zenodo](https://the-data-patch.github.io/github-zenodo-clinic/) - a lesson written by Steve Formel from [The Data Patch](https://www.thedatapatch.com/) for [Rutgers University Masters in Operational Oceanography program](https://rucool.marine.rutgers.edu/category/moo/).    

<br>

### Gliders

 - Underwater Glider User Group - [Data Management Tools](https://underwatergliders.org/glider-resources/data-management-tools/)

<br>
